title: Lactose tolerance
about: Whether your body keeps producing lactase — the enzyme that digests milk sugar — into adulthood.

title: Caffeine metabolism
about: How quickly your liver clears caffeine from your system.

title: Alcohol flush response
about: The 'Asian flush' — whether you break down alcohol's toxic byproduct (acetaldehyde) efficiently.

title: Alcohol metabolism rate
about: How fast the first step of alcohol breakdown runs.

title: Appetite & weight response
about: The most-studied common variant linked to appetite regulation and body weight.

title: Carbohydrate sensitivity
about: A variant linked to how the body manages blood sugar after carbs.

title: Bitter taste perception
about: How strongly you taste bitter compounds — which shapes feelings about brassica veg, coffee, and dark greens.

title: Omega fatty-acid processing
about: How well you convert plant-based ALA into the long-chain omega-3s (EPA/DHA) the body uses.

title: Folate processing (MTHFR C677T)
about: How efficiently you activate folate (vitamin B9) — relevant to B-vitamin needs.

title: Vitamin D levels
about: A variant influencing how readily you maintain vitamin D status.

title: Vitamin D transport
about: Affects the binding protein that carries vitamin D in the blood.

title: Iron absorption
about: A common variant affecting how much dietary iron you absorb.

title: Dopamine clearance (COMT)
about: The 'warrior / worrier' variant — how fast you clear dopamine in the prefrontal cortex, linked to stress response and focus style.

title: Earwax & body odor type
about: A single variant that determines wet vs. dry earwax — and correlates with sweat/body-odor type.

title: Eye colour
about: The single strongest common predictor of blue vs. brown eyes — it switches nearby pigment genes on or off.

title: Freckling & sun response
about: A pigment-gene variant linked to freckling and UV sensitivity.

title: Skin & hair pigment
about: Influences hair/skin tone, freckling, and how skin tans vs. burns.

title: Endurance vs. power
about: A variant in the 'mitochondrial master switch' linked to aerobic endurance capacity.

title: BDNF — learning & mood
about: A brain-growth-factor variant linked to memory, learning, and exercise-driven mood benefits.

title: Cholesterol handling (APOE)
about: One of two APOE markers. This one (rs7412) distinguishes the E2 form, associated with how the body clears blood lipids.

title: Triglyceride tendency
about: A common variant associated with how high blood triglycerides tend to run, especially on high-carb/high-fat diets.

title: Insulin sensitivity (PPARG)
about: The Ala variant is associated with modestly better insulin sensitivity — one of the more reassuring common metabolic variants.

title: Clotting — Factor V Leiden
about: A well-known variant affecting blood-clotting tendency. Important caveat below.

title: Training fuel & fibre type
about: A regulator of how muscle uses fat vs. carbohydrate for fuel — linked to endurance vs. power/strength leaning.

title: Fat-burning & training response
about: A receptor that governs how readily stored fat is mobilised during exercise and how the body responds to training.

title: Tendon & ligament resilience
about: A collagen-gene variant linked to connective-tissue strength and soft-tissue injury risk (sprains, tendon issues).

title: Lactate clearance
about: Affects how fast muscle clears lactate — relevant to high-intensity work and how quickly you recover between hard efforts.

title: Strength-training response
about: An angiotensinogen variant associated with muscle-growth and strength response to resistance training.

title: Antioxidant defense (skin aging)
about: SOD2 neutralises free radicals in cells. This variant affects how efficiently you clear oxidative stress — a driver of skin aging.

title: Hydrogen-peroxide clearance
about: Catalase breaks down hydrogen peroxide (an oxidant linked to greying and skin stress). This variant affects its level.

title: Detox & pollution defense
about: GSTP1 helps neutralise environmental toxins and pollution byproducts that stress skin.

title: UV response & tanning
about: A pigment-gene variant influencing how skin responds to UV — burning vs. tanning and melanoma-relevant sun sensitivity.

title: Cellular repair (P53)
about: TP53 is the cell's master 'repair-or-retire damaged cells' switch — relevant to how skin handles UV/oxidative damage over time.

title: Fat-cell programming (FTO causal)
about: The actual causal variant in the FTO obesity locus — it shifts fat cells away from calorie-burning beige fat toward calorie-storing white fat.

title: Appetite & snacking drive
about: A variant near the brain's master appetite-control gene, linked to satiety, snacking, and preference for energy-dense food.

title: Dietary fat response
about: A variant linked to how your weight and lipids respond to a high-saturated-fat diet.

title: Good-cholesterol (HDL) tendency
about: A variant associated with HDL ('good' cholesterol) levels and how they respond to diet and exercise.

title: Caffeine metabolism speed
about: How fast the CYP1A2 enzyme clears caffeine — the difference between a coffee that wears off in hours and one that keeps you up.

title: Warfarin dose sensitivity
about: A variant that strongly influences how much of the blood thinner warfarin a person needs — one of the best-established pharmacogenetic links.

title: Clopidogrel (Plavix) response
about: Whether you activate clopidogrel — a common anti-clotting drug after heart procedures. Poor metabolizers get less benefit from it.

title: Anaesthetic sensitivity (RYR1)
about: A rare but serious reaction to certain general anaesthetics. A consumer chip covers only a few of the many RYR1 variants — a normal result here does NOT rule it out.
